LAW AND MOTION 301, AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CROSS DEFENDANT SUSANA O'BRIEN'S MOTION TO VACATE ENTRY OF DEFAULT ON CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. CROSS-DEFENDANT MAY FILE THE PROPOSED ANSWER FORTHWITH. CROSS-DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY IS ORDERED TO PAY TO CROSS-COMPLAINANT ANY FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN OBTAINING THE DEFAULT AND IN OPPOSING THE SECOND EX-PARTE APPLICATION TO BRING THIS MOTION ON SHORTENED TIME. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MAY APPLY FOR SUCH FEES AND COSTS BY SEPARATE MOTION IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON THE AMOUNT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE REGIONAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT- MR. ROESTI REQUESTED THE COURT FOR A CONTINUANCE ON THE MATTER IN ORDER TO PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT HE FAILED TO PRESENT. THE COURT WITH THE CONSENT OF THE DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL AGREED TO CONTINUE THE MATTER TO HAVE A FULL RECORD OF THE CASE. MR. ROESTI TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES TO THE COURT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO SEPTEMBER 9, 2008 FOR HEARING. SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION TO THE MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES WHICH IS LIMITED TO THE ISSUE OF WHETHER THIS CASE NEEDED TO PROCEED BY WRIT OF MANDATE TO BE FILED ON OR BEFORE AUGUST 26, 2008. Defendant Golden Gate Regional Center'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE REGIONAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS A DUPLICATE ENTRY.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2008 Continued To Sep-09-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. FREDERICK C. ROESTI, TEL. NO. 552-3733 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RUFUS L. COLE, TEL. NO. 956-8800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY GOLDEN GATE REGIONAL CENTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE REGIONAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT- MR. ROESTI REQUESTED THE COURT FOR A CONTINUANCE ON THE MATTER IN ORDER TO PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT HE FAILED TO PRESENT. THE COURT WITH THE CONSENT OF THE DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL AGREED TO CONTINUE THE MATTER TO HAVE A FULL RECORD OF THE CASE. MR. ROESTI TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES TO THE COURT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO SEPTEMBER 9, 2008 FOR HEARING. SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION TO THE MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES WHICH IS LIMITED TO THE ISSUE OF WHETHER THIS CASE NEEDED TO PROCEED BY WRIT OF MANDATE TO BE FILED ON OR BEFORE AUGUST 26, 2008. SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY TO BE FILED ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 2, 2008. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189

Notice Of Motion To Compel Doreen Afuha'Anamgo To Appear For Deposition And Testify And To Compel Responses By Doreen Afuha'Amango To Request For Production Of Documents And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Monica S. Lee, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Golden Gate Regional Center
No other appearances

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Golden Gate Regional Center's Motion To Compel Doreen Afuha'Amango To Attend Her Deposition And Give Testimony is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc And Mtn To Vacate Entry Of Default On X-Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
FREDERICK CHRISTIAN ROESTI, ESQ., (415)552-3733, FOR CROSS DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, SUSANA O'BRIEN
MONICA S. LEE, ESQ.(LAW OFFICES OF RUFUS L. COLE), (415)956-8800, FOR CROSS COMPLAINANT/DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY, GOLDEN GATE REGIONAL CENTER

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CROSS DEFENDANT SUSANA O'BRIEN'S MOTION To Vacate Entry Of Default On CROSS-Complaint IS GRANTED. CROSS-DEFENDANT MAY FILE THE PROPOSED ANSWER FORTHWITH. CROSS-DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY IS ORDERED TO PAY TO CROSS-COMPLAINANT ANY FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN OBTAINING THE DEFAULT AND IN OPPOSING THE SECOND EX-PARTE APPLICATION TO BRING THIS MOTION ON SHORTENED TIME. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MAY APPLY FOR SUCH FEES AND COSTS BY SEPARATE MOTION IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON THE AMOUNT. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Ntc And Motin To Compel Responses By Pltf
Off Calendar May-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Golden Gate Regional Center's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Special And Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
